subcodes.first_line: God beareth witness, through His Own Self unto His Own Self, before the creation of all things, that there is none other God but Him, and He Who speaketh the truth is verily the Scroll [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله بذاته لذاته قبل خلق الاشیاء انه لا اله الا هو و الذی ینطق بالحق انه لهو الصحیفة
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @apocalyptic imagery, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @self-description of God; God's self-remembrance, @transcendence; unknowability of God
